caption:
Leo, your spark has been dimmed by the weight of others' expectations, leaving you wondering if you're truly enough.

You've spent years people-pleasing, sacrificing your own needs for the sake of love and validation.
But what happens when you're left with nothing but an empty tank and a shattered sense of self?
The truth is, you're not a reflection of their love, but a reflection of your own worth.
It's time to break free from the chains of conditional love and rediscover your inner fire.

The moment you stopped trusting yourself was the moment you started living for others.

Lucky number: 3
Lucky color: Golden
Today's vibe: EMPOWERMENT

Take a deep breath, Leo, and let's work on rebuilding that trust together.

Music provided by sonican (https://pixabay.com/users/sonican-38947841/)

#leo #astrology #horoscope #emotionalhealing

script.hook: Leo, your spark has been dimmed by the weight of others' expectations, leaving you wondering if you're truly enough.
body: You've spent years people-pleasing, sacrificing your own needs for the sake of love and validation.
But what happens when you're left with nothing but an empty tank and a shattered sense of self?
The truth is, you're not a reflection of their love, but a reflection of your own worth.
It's time to break free from the chains of conditional love and rediscover your inner fire.
You are enough, just as you are, and it's time to start living for yourself.
script.reveal: The moment you stopped trusting yourself was the moment you started living for others.
script.cta: Take a deep breath, Leo, and let's work on rebuilding that trust together.
script.affirmation: I trust myself and my worth, and I choose to live for my own happiness.
